name: Quantum ESPRESSO On Slurm
summary: Run Quantum ESPRESSO PWscf jobs on Slurm with MPI sizing and restart planning.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm pattern for Quantum ESPRESSO pw.x jobs, including MPI task layout, generated input from a template, pseudopotential path checks, scratch and wavefunction directories, restart planning, and dry-run-first SCF smoke-test controls.

tools.name: pw.x
tools.notes: Quantum ESPRESSO PWscf executable; sites may expose it through modules, containers, or wrapper commands.

inputs.name: input_template
inputs.description: Quantum ESPRESSO pw.x input template with placeholders for prefix, pseudo_dir, outdir, wfcdir, and max_seconds.

inputs.name: pseudopotential_dir
inputs.description: Directory containing the pseudopotential files referenced by the input template.

inputs.name: pw_executable
inputs.description: Quantum ESPRESSO pw.x executable or site wrapper command.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Directory for generated input, output, scratch records, and restart notes.

outputs.name: qe_launch_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable Slurm, MPI, executable, input, pseudopotential, scratch, and restart plan.

outputs.name: qe_generated_input
outputs.description: Rendered pw.x input file with concrete prefix, pseudo_dir, outdir, wfcdir, and max_seconds values.

outputs.name: qe_output
outputs.description: pw.x stdout output file when RUN_QE=1.

outputs.name: qe_restart_state
outputs.description: Quantum ESPRESSO outdir and wavefunction files needed for continuation or follow-on calculations.

examples.title: Plan or run a Quantum ESPRESSO pw.x smoke test on Slurm

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Check the Slurm wrapper shell syntax.
Run plan-only mode first; set RUN_QE=1 only after loading a site-approved Quantum ESPRESSO executable and providing a pseudopotential file matching the input template.
